{ "name": "@eslint/core", "version": "0.17.0", "description": "Runtime-agnostic core of ESLint", "type": "module", "types": "./dist/esm/types.d.ts", "exports": { "types": { "import": "./dist/esm/types.d.ts", "require": "./dist/cjs/types.d.cts" } }, "files": [ "dist" ], "publishConfig": { "access": "public" }, "scripts": { "build:cts": "node -e \"fs.cpSync('dist/esm/types.d.ts', 'dist/cjs/types.d.cts')\"", "build": "tsc && npm run build:cts", "test:jsr": "npx jsr@latest publish --dry-run", "test:types": "tsc -p tests/types/tsconfig.json" }, "repository": { "type": "git", "url": "git+https://github.com/eslint/rewrite.git", "directory": "packages/core" }, "keywords": [ "eslint", "core" ], "author": "Nicholas C. Zakas", "license": "Apache-2.0", "bugs": { "url": "https://github.com/eslint/rewrite/issues" }, "homepage": "https://github.com/eslint/rewrite/tree/main/packages/core#readme", "dependencies": { "@types/json-schema": "^7.0.15" }, "devDependencies": { "json-schema": "^0.4.0" }, "engines": { "node": "^18.18.0 || ^20.9.0 || >=21.1.0" } }
